archive_data.question_text: Read the below statements and select the correct option with respect to self-help groups. (i) A self-help group is a registered group of micro-entrepreneurs. (ii) The micro-entrepreneurs of self-help groups have similar social and economic backgrounds.

explanation.english: Self-help groups (SHGs) are generally informal associations formed by people from similar socio-economic backgrounds to pool their savings and provide mutual support. They are not necessarily registered from inception, though they may register later for bank linkages. Thus, statement (i) is false and statement (ii) is true.
explanation.tanglish: Suyadhu sei kuzhuvugal (SHGs) ondraana samauga selvara pinjamum matrum samsaayamum udaiya makkalal thamthan iruthi iyakkappadum kuzhuvugal. Avaigal sadharanamaaga record seyyapadatha kuzhuvugalaaga thodangappattu, pinbu bank sambandhathukkaaga matram record seyyappadalaam. Aagave, kooru (i) poiyathu, kooru (ii) sariyana uthirvu.

archive_data.question_text: Ranjeet Singh belonged to which Misal of the Sikh community?

explanation.english: Maharaja Ranjit Singh belonged to the Sukarchakia misal, which was one of the twelve Sikh misls. He consolidated the power of this misal and established the Sikh Empire in the Punjab region.
explanation.tanglish: Maharaja Ranjit Singh Sikh samudhaaya pathugalin Sukarchakia misalku seendhu piranthavar. Ivan than rule laikki Sikh samrajyathai uruvaakkiyathu.

archive_data.question_text: In which of the following years did young leaders in Satara in Maharashtra set up a parallel government Parti Sarkar that ran People's court and organised constructive work?

explanation.english: During the Quit India Movement in 1943, young leaders in Satara, Maharashtra established a parallel government called 'Prati Sarkar' (Parti Sarkar). This underground government organized people's courts and undertook various constructive activities resisting British rule.
explanation.tanglish: 1943-aandil Quit India Iyakkathin poadhu, Maharashtra Satara-il ilangiya nethaargal 'Prati Sarkar' endra anaiththu sarkar-ai uruvaakkinaargal. Ithu makkal neethi mandarangalai nadathi paguthariya velaiygalai seithathu.

archive_data.question_text: Ramchandra Manjhi, Padma Shri 2021 awardee, was conferred the award for which of the following contributions to art?

options.text: Playing and folk singing of tribal Kinneras
Carrying forward the legacy of Gramin Natak and folk dancing
Adapting the clarinet to Carnatic music

explanation.english: Ramchandra Manjhi was awarded the Padma Shri in 2021 for his contribution to carrying forward the legacy of Gramin Natak (folk theater) and folk dancing, particularly preserving the Launda Naach tradition of Bihar.
explanation.tanglish: Ramchandra Manjhi 2021-aandu Bihar-il Gramin Natak matrum naattupura aadalai thodarapalikka seidha thondaanukkaaga Padma Shri award paeththaar.

archive_data.question_text: Who among the following rulers strengthened the Satavahana empire in the Deccan in ancient India?

explanation.english: Gautamiputra Satakarni was the greatest of the Satavahana rulers who restored the glory of the Satavahana empire in the Deccan by defeating the Shaka rulers and expanding the empire's territory.
explanation.tanglish: Gautamiputra Satakarni Satavahana chakravarthigalin udaiya miga periya pudhar. Ivan Deccan-il Satavahana samrajya pugazhaiththu Shaka padhaiththali vettri petru samrajyathai adistamaanavan seithavar.
